abstract: Designates Monday, April 13, 2026, as Knock Knock Children's Museum Day at the Louisiana State Capitol and recognizes the museum's contributions to early childhood education, family engagement, and economic vitality in Louisiana.
fullText:
The original instrument and the following digest, which constitutes no part of the
legislative instrument, were prepared by Senate Legislative Services. The keyword,
summary, and digest do not constitute part of the law or proof or indicia of legislative
intent. [R.S. 1:13(B) and 24:177(E)]
DIGEST
SR 29 Original 2026 Regular Session Selders
Designates Monday, April 13, 2026, as Knock Knock Children's Museum Day at the Louisiana State
Capitol and recognizes the museum's contributions to early childhood education, family engagement,
and economic vitality in Louisiana.
